strategy: Very low health (1,200) fight with three weak minions. A quick AoE clears the room.
Join on time; the only cheat triggers on latecomers.
Blade once and AoE everything down.
He is stunable if you ever need to skip a turn.
cheatNotes: Only matters if you join late: a Feckless Soul steals one pip from the latecomer. Arrive on time and it never fires.
